# vector: block_data_1blk
# BLOCK_DATA：1 块（N=4×M=2 全 I16，stride=4，样本含 0 与负值——COBS 含零路径覆盖）
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 55a10009002c00010100000000050000000000e8030000110000000400020003000400000064009cff0000c80038ff00002c01ff1d1c45
wire: 0355a10209022c03010101010102050101010103e8030102110101020402020203020401010264039cff0102c80338ff01072c01ff1d1c4500
